seo.title: Django REST Framework for Django
seo.description: How Django REST Framework fits into real Django workflows.

content.headline: Django Sync View Async Conversion Checker
content.description: Identifies sync functions in Django views and suggests async conversion patterns to avoid blocking the event loop.

examples.label: Sync View Conversion
examples.expected_output:
Suggested async conversion: async def my_view(request): data = await fetch_data_sync()
Replace fetch_data_sync() with async version

examples.label: Blocking Operation Detection
examples.expected_output: Warning: Blocking operation detected in expensive_operation. Use asyncio.sleep() instead.

content.how_it_works: Analyzes input code for sync functions, detects blocking operations, and provides actionable async conversion suggestions without requiring external dependencies.
